slides.headline: Master NCD Programs
slides.body: Understand special considerations for Non-College Degree Programs (NCDs) and streamline your certification process.

slides.headline: Understand NCD Programs
slides.body: Identify NCD programs that qualify for VA certification under Chapter 33, Section 3072.

slides.headline: Review Program Eligibility
slides.body: Verify the program aligns with VA's COE criteria and is in compliance with Chapter 33, Section 3072.

slides.headline: Gather Documentation
slides.body: Collect necessary documents for approval, including program descriptions, student information, and institutional policies.

slides.headline: Submit for Approval
slides.body: Submit the documentation to your State Approving Agency (SAA) for certification approval.

slides.headline: Maintain Compliance
slides.body: Stay updated on changes in VA certification rules and maintain compliance to ensure ongoing certification.
Learn more with VASCO Assistant Pro. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Master the unique requirements of Non-College Degree Programs (NCDs) with comprehensive guidance on certification and compliance. Learn more with VASCO Assistant Pro.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 1 of 5, as it could benefit from a more engaging headline to capture attention.
